riskFloorReasons: new capability: new exported class / subsystem added
new capability: new config key added

causalAutopsy.notes: Subscription registration historically admitted records without provider-attested email, while the delivered-mandate consumer had no durable convergence bound for an unchanged identity failure. The malformed legacy row exposed both latent gaps.

guardEvidence.howCaught: A permanently failing account-machine pair advances through three bounded delays and reaches a durable parked steady state after its fourth attempt, so an every-minute failure edge cannot remain eligible.
